---
title: "Teaching"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

<br>
I teach workshops in R for data analysis, automation and visualization.

<!-- https://education.rstudio.com/trainers/people/brendan+ansell/  -->
<br/>

My recent [book](https://bookdown.org/ansellbr/WEHI_tidyR_course_book/) could help you to learn R.
